stackRefinements.ui: React 18 SPA built with Vite, TypeScript
stackRefinements.db: Prisma 5 data layer (@prisma/client runtime, prisma CLI for schema/migrations)

ordering.description: shared is the sole provider, consumed by both ui and api (runtime dependencies, not dev-only) — in cross-layer tasks shared changes first, then ui/api. db is an island: no layer declares a dependency on it and it consumes no internal package, so db-touching tasks have no manifest-derived ordering constraint relative to other layers. ui and api are leaf consumers with no edges between them; neither orders before the other.
